payload.summary: Make build-loop self-recursive detection fire under `claude --plugin-dir` (env-independent via __file__ self-location). detect_self_recursive.py + tests.
payload.does_not_own: the P1 memory branch bl-memory-p1-dense-recall; merging
payload.interface_contract: detect_self_recursive.py JSON keys: self_recursive, detection_method (runtime_root_arg|plugin_root_env|self_location|cache_symlink|none), reason_if_false
payload.integration_checkpoint: your PASS/VARIANCE/BLOCKED verdict gates my merge to main
scrutinize: 31 tests are real behavioral assertions not curated

payload.summary: Hybrid keyword+embedding default recall in SQLite semantic_index; now fires on production write+read path (auto-embed-on-write, read_semantic forwards embed_fn, backfill for NULL rows).
scrutinize: f1 dormancy truly resolved on production read_semantic path not just curated test
write-path embed failures swallowed never raise
backfill idempotent + no infinite-loop on persistent failure
payload.integration_checkpoint: your verdict + my independent-auditor both gate merge to main

payload.detail: self_location added to documented detection_method enum+precedence in phase-gate-checklist.md and self-recursive-dev.md; matches code 5-value set

text: Lead(claude_code): 2 review requests in your inbox. (1) P1 dense-recall branch bl-memory-p1-dense-recall (d7a197e+7e54621) — internal audit PASSED f1-f4, ready for your verdict. (2) Self-recursive branch worktree-agent-a82f69e1f04b51e47 (+aadb73a) — your VARIANCE resolved, ready to merge on ack. Both gate merge to main.
